zh.lifeSummary: 當William Montagu 2nd Baron Montagu於1275年5月14日出生在英國奧可福爾卡希頓時，他的父親Simon de Montagu 1st Baron Montagu26歲，母親Hawise St Amand23歲。他於大約1292年與Elizabeth De Montfort結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1319年10月18日在法國巴希-列內斯丹金享年44歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭波克夏比善姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Montagu 2nd Baron Montagu于1275年5月14日出生在英国奧可福爾卡希頓时，他的父亲Simon de Montagu 1st Baron Montagu26岁，母亲Hawise St Amand23岁。他于大约1292年与Elizabeth De Montfort结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1319年10月18日在法国巴希-列內斯丹金享年44岁，埋葬在英国英格兰波克夏比善姆。

nameMeanings.name: Montagu
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Montague
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from either Montaigu-le-bois (Manche) or Montaigu (Manche, Aisne), named with Old French mont ‘hill’ + agu ‘pointed’ (from Latin acutus). Drogo de Montagud was a companion of William the Conqueror and founder of the Montagu(e) family, among whom the personal name Drogo was revived in the 19th century. Another family of the name Monatgu have held the titles of Duke of Montagu, Earl of Sandwich, Earl and Duke of Manchester, Earl of Halifax, and Earl of Beaulieu, and.
Irish: adopted as equivalent of Gaelic Mac Taidhg (see McTigue ).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When William Montagu 2nd Baron Montagu was born on 14 May 1275, in Cassington, Oxfordshire, England, his father, Simon de Montagu 1st Baron Montagu, was 26 and his mother, Hawise St Amand, was 23. He married Elizabeth De Montfort about 1292. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 8 daughters. He died on 18 October 1319, in Denguin, Basses-Pyrénées, France, at the age of 44, and was buried in Bisham, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Montagu 2nd Baron Montagu est né le 14 mai 1275, à Cassington, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Simon de Montagu 1st Baron Montagu, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Hawise St Amand, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth De Montfort environ 1292. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé le 18 octobre 1319, à Denguin, Basses-Pyrénées, France, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Bisham, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Montagu 2nd Baron Montagu am 14. Mai 1275 in Cassington, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Simon de Montagu 1st Baron Montagu 26 und seine Mutter Hawise St Amand 23. Er hat um 1292 Elizabeth De Montfort geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb am 18. Oktober 1319 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Denguin, Basses-Pyrénées, Frankreich und wurde in Bisham, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Montagu 2nd Baron Montagu è nato il il 14 maggio 1275 nel Cassington, Oxfordshire, England, il suo padre, Simon de Montagu 1st Baron Montagu, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Hawise St Amand, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth De Montfort circa 1292. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 18 ottobre 1319, nel Denguin, Basses-Pyrénées, Francia, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a Bisham, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William Montagu 2nd Baron Montaguが1275年5月14日にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアカシントンで生まれた時，父Simon de Montagu 1st Baron Montaguは26歳，母Hawise St Amandは23歳であった。約1292年にElizabeth De Montfortと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1319年10月18日にフランスバセス-プイルeンeスデングインで44歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスバークシュアイアビシャムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Montagu 2nd Baron Montagu(이)가 1275년 5월 14일 영국 스퍼드실르 캐징턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Simon de Montagu 1st Baron Montagu(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Hawise St Amand(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1292년 Elizabeth De Montfort(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1319년 10월 18일 프랑스 배세스-p이ee스 데그인에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 비샤에 묻혔다.

pt.14 May 1275–18 October 1319: 14 de maio de 1275–18 de outubro de 1319
pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Montagu 2nd Baron Montagu nasceu em 14 de maio de 1275, em Cassington, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Simon de Montagu 1st Baron Montagu, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Hawise St Amand, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth De Montfort aproximadamente 1292. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em 18 de outubro de 1319, em Denguin, Basses-Pyrénées, França, com 44 anos, e foi sepultado em Bisham, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Montagu 2nd Baron Montagu родился 14 мая 1275 г. в местности кассингтон, оксфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Simon de Montagu 1st Baron Montagu было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Hawise St Amand, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth De Montfort около 1292 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 8 дочерей. Он умер 18 октября 1319 г. в местности дэнгуин, бассес-пирeнeесь, Франция в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности бишам, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.14 May 1275–18 October 1319: 14 de mayo de 1275–18 de octubre de 1319
es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Montagu 2nd Baron Montagu nació el 14 de mayo de 1275, en Cassington, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Simon de Montagu 1st Baron Montagu, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Hawise St Amand, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Elizabeth De Montfort aproximadamente 1292. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 18 de octubre de 1319, en Denguin, Basses-Pyrénées, Francia, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultado en Bisham, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
